info.english_meaning: to wrap to cover to clothe
info.hindI_arTa: vastrAdi se AcCAdita karanA vastra oढ़AnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' stfYaH Sni cCAdane pvAdeH stfRIte ca stfRAti ca  SnAvfdantasya ... ' (Slo. 35) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kusumAstaraRe sahAyatAM bahuSaH sOmya gatastvamAvayoH' (ku0 435) kusumAstaraRaM kusumaSayanam
'niveSanaM punarnavIkftya lepanAstaraRopastaraREH' (ASva0 gf0 23) AstaraRaM kuTaH kawaH
'prAgagrEH kuSEH paristfRAti trivft paYcavfdvA' (SAM0 gf0 182) sarvatra parita AcCAdanamevArTaH
'yasya vedirupastIrRA tasya lokA yaTA mama' (BA0 SAM0 9830) upastIrRA kuSErAstIrRA
'taM vE sadA kAmacaramanupastIrRaSAyinam' (BA0 SAM0 17613) SayyAhIno BUtale yaH Sete tacCIlaH
'anuttarIyavasanamanupastIrRaSAyinam bAhUpaDAnaM SAmyantaM taM devA brAhmaRaM viduH' (BA0 SAM0 26930).. ukto'rTaH
'AvasaTaM dadyAdupariSayyAmupastaraRamupaDAnaM sAvastaraRamaByaYjanaM ceti' (Apa0 Da0 23615) upastaraRaM tUlikA avastaraRamuparipawaH
'niveSanaM punarnavIkftya lepanAstaraRopastaraREH' (ASva0 gf0 233) upastaraRaM BUmeH samIkaraRamiti nArAyaRo vfttikAraH
'SukrAdupastaraRABiDAraRe' (kA0 SrO0 9922) SukrAd droRakalaSasTAt somAdunnIya upastaraRaM vikaraRam aBitaH prakzepaH
